title: Outbound Proxy Worker via Cloudflare for Stable Egress
description: Route all outbound API calls from the Cloudways Laravel application through a secure Cloudflare Worker proxy. This provides stable egress IP addresses for API integrations that require IP whitelisting (e.g., Snowflake, Salesforce).
acceptance_criteria: Outbound API calls are routed through the Cloudflare Worker proxy
Stable egress IP addresses are maintained for API whitelisting
No regressions in API call latency or reliability
middleware_changes: Laravel HTTP client configured to route outbound requests through the Cloudflare Worker proxy.
api_changes: All outbound API calls proxied through Cloudflare Worker for stable egress.
implementation_notes: Cloudflare Worker acts as an outbound proxy providing consistent egress IPs. Important for services that require IP whitelisting like Snowflake network policies.
